events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to identify the component or condition: "unreamed cut ends" on EMT. This is a defect. EMT must be reamed to remove burrs to protect conductors. So decision: fail. Risk: high because sharp edges can damage insulation, leading to shorts or shock. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective (since it's installed but defective). Percent complete: maybe 90%? Rough-complete but defect needs rework. Value: none. Sound source: none. Confidence: high. Event time: none. Rate: none. Order: none. Workable: none. Findings: "Unreamed cut ends on EMT present sharp edges that can damage conductor insulation." Actions: "Ream all cut ends to remove burrs before pulling conductors." Rationale: NEC 358.28 requires reaming to prevent abrasion. References: NEC Art. 358.28. So JSON.
